Description: Dig deep down, mine up ore
Actual Requirements: Obtain a pickaxe

Description: Mine stone with your new pickaxe
Actual Requirements: Obtain a block of cobblestone, stone, cobbled deepslate, deepslate, or blackstone

Description: Discover every cave biome
Actual Requirements: Enter the following biomes: Lush Caves, Dripstone Caves and Deep Dark
Notes: Formerly required just entering cave_air below y-level 56 before 1.14 Alpha Build 1

Description: Spend five in-game days below y-level 32
Actual Requirements: This can only be obtained in the Overworld

Description: Dig through some Rooted Dirt beneath an Azalea Tree so you can find a Lush Cave
Fall through a Big Dripleaf
Actual Requirements: Enter a big dripleaf block while its tilt is fully down

Description: Eat some Glow Berries
Obtain a Spore Blossom
Use Bone Meal on Moss to spread its wonderful lushness across hard blocks of stone
Actual Requirements: Use Bone Meal on a Moss Block

Description: Obtain an Azalea
Actual Requirements: Obtain either an Azalea or a Flowering Azalea

Description: Obtain a stack of all lush-related blocks
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stack of:

Description: Submerge yourself in complete darkness
Actual Requirements: Enter a block where the light level is 0

Description: Get caught in a cave-in of gravel
Actual Requirements: Enter a block of gravel

Description: Accidentally hit a bat underground
Kill a Bat while under the blindness or darkness effect
Use a Spyglass to stare at a bat from at least 50 blocks away
Dig up some flint from a patch of gravel
Actual Requirements: Obtain flint

Description: Craft Flint and Steel and use it to light the ground on fire
Mine a stack of flint
Light every flammable block on fire
Actual Requirements: A list of blocks can be found at: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Fire#Burning_blocks

Description: Open a chest in a dungeon deep underground
Actual Requirements: Open a Dungeon loot chest that has not been opened before

Description: Find an abandoned mineshaft that was not dug out by you
Actual Requirements: Enter an abandoned mineshaft

Description: Find a mineshaft on the surface of a mesa biome
Actual Requirements: Enter an abandoned mineshaft above y=64 in any badlands biome

Description: Get stuck in a cobweb
Actual Requirements: Enter a cobweb

Description: Loot a minecart chest from an Abandoned Mineshaft
Actual Requirements: Open a Mineshaft loot chest that has not been opened before

Description: Use shears to obtain Glow Lichen from an underground cave
Obtain some Pointed Dripstone from a Dripstone Cave
Survive a fall of at least 10 blocks onto some Pointed Dripstone
Actual Requirements: The pointed dripstone cannot be waterlogged

Description: Survive a long fall with just a sliver of health remaining
Actual Requirements: Fall at least 15 blocks and have 1 or 2 health remaining upon landing

Description: Free fall from the top of the world (build limit) to the bottom of the world and survive
Actual Requirements: Drop from a point above y-level 319 and land below y-level -59

Description: Mine deep enough that the stone darkens
Actual Requirements: Go below y-level 5.5 in the Overworld

Description: Dig down to the bottom of the world
Actual Requirements: Go below y-level -59.5 in the Overworld

Description: Place every cave block at the very top of the world
Actual Requirements: Place at y-level 319:

Description: Sneak near something in the Deep Dark to prevent being heard
Actual Requirements: Sneak in a way that you avoid making a vibration near a Sculk Sensor, Shrieker, or Warden

Description: Kill a mob near a Sculk Catalyst
Trigger a Sculk Shrieker in the Deep Dark. Might not want to do that too many more times…
Actual Requirements: Receive the Darkness effect

Description: Find and enter an Ancient City deep underground
Loot a chest inside an ice box in an Ancient City
Actual Requirements: Generate the loot of an ancient city ice box chest (i.e. you must be the first to open it)

Description: Using Echo Shards found in Ancient Cities, craft a Recovery Compass
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Recovery Compass

Description: Collect enough Disc Fragments to craft another producer of mysterious sounds
Actual Requirements: Obtain Music Disc 5

Description: Collect a stack of Echo Shards
Construct a better pickaxe
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stone pickaxe

Description: Craft a stone pickaxe, axe, shovel and hoe
Break your first tool
Mine 1728 cobblestone, place it in a chest, then stand on it in victory
Actual Requirements: 27 stacks of 64 cobblestone in a single chest. You must stand on top of the chest

Description: Destroy a total of 10,000 blocks of stone
Actual Requirements: Mine a total of 10,000 blocks of stone

Description: Coal! As in dead dinosaurs!
Actual Requirements: Obtain coal

Description: Mine a stack of coal
Mine enough coal to make a stack of coal blocks
Construct a furnace out of eight stone blocks
Smelt wood trunks using charcoal to make more charcoal
Actual Requirements: Smelt charcoal

Description: Upgrade your furnace to a smoker using some logs
Smelt a Copper Ingot
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Copper Ingot

Description: Craft a slightly better pickaxe
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Copper Pickaxe

Description: Mine a stack of Raw Copper
Wear a full suit of Copper Armor while surrounded by at least ten living Copper Golems
Actual Requirements: The Copper Golems must all be within 10 blocks of you

Description: Mine enough copper to make a stack of Copper Blocks
Actual Requirements: Obtain 64 unoxidized, unwaxed Blocks of Copper

Description: Craft a Lightning Rod using Copper Ingots
Actual Requirements: Obtain any kind of lightning rod

Description: Protect a villager from an undesired shock without starting a fire
Actual Requirements: Have lightning strike a lightning rod with a villager standing at a safe distance away
Notes: lightning_rod_with_villager_no_fire is a hilarious internal name

Description: Get struck by lightning while standing on a Lightning Rod
Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Lightning Rods, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Build a Copper Golem
Apply Honeycomb to a Copper Golem to stop it from oxidizing
Actual Requirements: Use Honeycomb on a Copper Golem

Description: Smash a living Copper Golem into scrap
Actual Requirements: Kill a Copper Golem

Description: Have a Copper Golem completely oxidize into a statue, then mine it
Actual Requirements: Obtain either an Oxidized Copper Golem Statue or Waxed Oxidized Copper Golem Statue
Notes: Formerly required just obtaining any kind of Oxidized Copper until 1.20 Alpha Build 1

Description: Cycle a Copper Golem Statue through all its poses
Actual Requirements: The poses are: Standing, Sitting, Running and Star

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Golem Statues, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Craft some Cut Copper
Actual Requirements: Obtain any block with the word "Cut Copper" in it (so it can be any oxidisation state, can be waxed, and can be a slab or stairs)

Description: Craft or obtain a Copper Grate
Use Honeycombs to wax a Copper Block, preventing it from oxidising
Actual Requirements: Use a honeycomb on any unwaxed copper block OR craft any waxed copper block by adding honeycomb to an unwaxed copper block in the crafting table
Notes: Formerly an original advancement named "Wax On, Wax Off" before vanilla added it

Description: Use an axe to scrape wax off of a Copper Block
Actual Requirements: Use an axe on any waxed copper block

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Chests, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Bars, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Chains, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Grates, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Lanterns, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Bulbs, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Doors and Trapdoors, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Normal, Exposed, Weathered and Oxidized, as well as all their waxed variants

Description: Collect a stack of every oxidizing stage of Copper Blocks, Chiseled Copper, and Cut Copper Blocks, Slabs and Stairs, including all of their waxed variants
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stack of:

Description: Smelt an iron ingot
Actual Requirements: Obtain an iron ingot

Description: Craft or find iron nuggets
Upgrade your pickaxe
Actual Requirements: Obtain an iron pickaxe

Description: Protect yourself with a piece of iron armor
Actual Requirements: Wear either an iron helmet, chestplate, leggings, or boots

Description: Wear a full suit of iron armor
Actual Requirements: Wear an iron helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots at the same time

Description: Mine a stack of Raw Iron
Mine enough iron to make a stack of iron blocks
Strike gold and smelt it into a gold ingot
Actual Requirements: Obtain a gold ingot

Description: Make yourself shiny with golden armor
Actual Requirements: Wear either a golden helmet, chestplate, leggings or boots

Description: Put Mending on a piece of golden armor and realise what you are doing in life
Actual Requirements: Obtain a golden helmet, chestplate, leggings or boots enchanted with Mending

Description: Mine a stack of Raw Gold
Mine enough gold to make a stack of gold blocks
Completely use up a golden pickaxe, and then seriously reevaluate your life choices
Actual Requirements: Break a golden pickaxe

Description: Break every kind of shovel
Break every single tool and weapon in the game
Actual Requirements: Break the following tools:

Description: Break every type of armor piece in the game
Actual Requirements: Break the following pieces of armor:

Description: It's still useful for enchanting
Actual Requirements: Obtain lapis lazuli

Description: Mine enough lapis lazuli to craft a stack of lapis lazuli blocks
Mine some redstone from the deepest caves
Actual Requirements: Obtain redstone dust

Description: Craft a compass in case you forgot where spawn is
Actual Requirements: Obtain a compass

Description: Craft a Lodestone using Chiseled Stone Bricks and an Iron Ingot
Notes: This advancement and the two below were moved from the Nether tab to the Mining tab in 1.18.2 Beta Build 1

Description: Use a Compass on a Lodestone
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Lodestone Compass
Notes: Known as "Sith Wayfinder" before added as a vanilla advancement in 1.10 Beta Build 10

Description: Create a Lodestone Compass in all three dimensions
Actual Requirements: Use a compass on a lodestone in all three dimensions (not all at the same time)

Description: Time to clean your clocks! (Or, craft them!)
Actual Requirements: Obtain a clock

Description: Mine enough redstone to craft a stack of redstone blocks
Find an Amethyst Geode and mine an Amethyst Cluster
Actual Requirements: Obtain an amethyst shard

Description: Mine some Calcite encasing an Amethyst Geode
Actual Requirements: Obtain calcite

Description: Zoom in on something using a Spyglass
Actual Requirements: Zoom in using a spyglass

Description: Craft Tinted Glass using Glass and Amethyst Shards and use it to block out light
Actual Requirements: Place tinted glass

Description: Mine a stack of Amethyst Blocks, Amethyst Clusters, and every size of Amethyst Bud
Actual Requirements: Obtain 64 Amethyst Blocks, Clusters, and Small, Medium and Large Amethyst Buds

Description: Acquire diamonds
Create a pickaxe of the highest calibre
Actual Requirements: Obtain a diamond pickaxe

Description: Do you like my sword sword
Actual Requirements: Obtain a diamond sword

Description: Craft a full diamond tools set
Actual Requirements: Craft a diamond pickaxe, shovel, axe and hoe

Description: Break your first diamond pickaxe
Diamond armor saves lives
Actual Requirements: Wear either a diamond helmet, chestplate, leggings, or boots

Description: A full suit of diamond armor saves even more lives
Actual Requirements: Wear a diamond helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots at the same time

Description: Mine a stack of diamonds. Good luck!
Throw diamonds at another player or mob
Actual Requirements: Throw a diamond and have any other entity pick it up

Actual Requirements: Obtain a block of:

Description: Mine enough diamond to make a stack of diamond blocks
Mine and craft a stack of Raw Iron, Copper and Gold Blocks
Mine a stack of raw emerald ore
Actual Requirements: Obtain 64 Emerald Ore or 64 Deepslate Emerald Ore

Description: Mine a stack of every ore block
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stack of:Deepslate Emerald Ore is not required

Description: Fill a bucket with lava
Actual Requirements: Obtain a lava bucket

Description: Form and mine a block of Obsidian
Actual Requirements: Obtain a block of obsidian

Description: Craft an enchanting table
Build, light and enter a Nether Portal
Actual Requirements: Enter a nether portal block

Description: Mine a stack of obsidian. (This might take a while...)
